title: PCAP capture support in Python simulator
description: Add a --pcap=FILE option to the Python LoRa simulator that writes captured frames in libpcap format (DLT_USER0). Lets Wireshark open the file and apply the LICHEN Lua dissector. Pure Python using struct, no libpcap dependency.
close_reason: --pcap FILE flag added to lichen-sim CLI; PcapngWriter threaded through SimulatorServer into all node servers
